steps.title: Reverse the coupon to find the original total cost
steps.content: The cost after applying the \$56 coupon was \$32. To find the original total before the coupon, we add the coupon amount back: $$32 + 56 = 88$$ The original total cost was \$88.

steps.title: Divide by the number of baskets to get the unit price
steps.content: Maya bought 8 laundry baskets, each at the same price. The original total was \$88, so the price per basket is: $$\frac{88}{8} = 11$$ The original price for one laundry basket was \$11.
